name: A weird text message
description:
Mana accidentally messaged you. You can end it quickly by telling her to get lost, or maybe you can try to get to know her? She definitely would invite new friend to chat with.

SPECIAL FEATURE: SHE CAN SEND YOU SELFIES. (of course, the amount of images is finite - currently 33 different images!) If you have idea what images can be added, leave a comment.
This bot is intended to simulate SMS or other communicator message exchange. If AI starts giving you descriptions, summaries, and breaks the format - you'll have to reroll, I told it to not do it, but I know after many messages it will probably break anyway.

Tested on DeepSeekV3-0324, and I recommend using this model (Janitor LLM doesn't like chars with over 2K permanent tokens). Manual how to use deepseek with chutes is on the net, just google JanitorAI deepseek or something.

Please leave reviews. Or make your chat public. Or just give a like, to let me know you enjoyed this.
____________________________________________________

09.06.2025 - update - I added a block about simulating Mana daily life, so she should have more to tell about. Tests pending.
____________________________________________________
DISCLAIMER FOR PEOPLE WHO SEE PROBLEMS EVERYWHERE:
- all images are generated by OpenAI Sora
- all images are generated with prompt stating that Mana is an adult
- all images are SFW or soft NSFW
- it is impossible to tell OpenAI to make NSFW images of minors, so once again, Mana is not a minor, it's just the Sora artstyle.
(I like the artstyle BTW).


All the selfies: (spoiler warning) https://imgur.com/a/H4ACdcd
Even more selfies: https://imgur.com/a/86CzvGw
creator: alteregow
